$date
    Mar 10, 2026  20:43:59
$end
$version
    TOOL:	ncsim(64)	15.10-s015
$end
$timescale
    1 ns
$end

$scope module testbench $end
$var reg       1 !    clk  $end

$scope module vif $end
$var wire      1 "    clk  $end
$var reg       1 #    rst_n  $end
$var reg       1 $    enable  $end
$var reg      16 %    A [15:0] $end
$var reg      16 &    B [15:0] $end
$var reg       4 '    opcode [3:0] $end
$var reg      16 (    result [15:0] $end
$var reg       1 )    zero_flag  $end
$var reg       1 *    overflow_flag  $end
$upscope $end


$scope module dut $end
$var parameter 32 +    WIDTH  $end
$var wire      1 "    clk  $end
$var wire      1 ,    rst_n  $end
$var wire      1 -    enable  $end
$var wire     16 .    A [15:0] $end
$var wire     16 /    B [15:0] $end
$var wire      4 0    opcode [3:0] $end
$var reg      16 1    result [15:0] $end
$var reg       1 2    zero_flag  $end
$var reg       1 3    overflow_flag  $end
$var reg      16 4    gated_operandA [15:0] $end
$var reg      16 5    gated_operandB [15:0] $end
$var reg       4 6    gated_opcode [3:0] $end
$var reg      16 7    next_result [15:0] $end
$var reg       1 8    next_zero  $end
$var reg       1 9    next_overflow  $end
$var reg      17 :    temp_add_sub [16:0] $end
$upscope $end

$upscope $end

$enddefinitions $end
$dumpvars
